# Harnesses

The harness is the runtime that executes your agent loop. Swap one line to switch runtimes.

```
executor:
  harness: claude
```

## Supported harnesses

| Harness | Runtime | Best for |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `claude-sdk` | Claude Agent SDK | Custom agents powered by Claude models. `claude` is accepted as an alias. |
| `claude-native` | Claude Code | Native Claude Code sessions, including the terminal-first `omni claude` path. |
| `codex` | Codex | Headless Codex-backed agents and GPT-model sub-agents. |
| `codex-native` | Codex | Native Codex sessions, including the terminal-first `omni codex` path. |
| `openai-agents` | OpenAI Agents SDK | Agents built on the OpenAI Agents SDK. |
| `cursor` | Cursor Agent SDK | Headless Cursor agents using Cursor's own backend and model IDs. |
| `cursor-native` | Cursor Agent | Native Cursor sessions. |
| `pi` | Pi | Headless multi-model worker that runs on any gateway model. Ideal for review, exploration, and read-heavy tasks delegated by a supervisor agent. |
| `pi-native` | Pi | Native Pi sessions, including the terminal-first `omni pi` path. |
| `antigravity` | Google Antigravity SDK | Gemini-native Antigravity agents. Aliases include `agy` and `google-antigravity`. |
| `antigravity-native` | Google Antigravity CLI | Native Antigravity sessions. |
| `opencode-native` | OpenCode | Native OpenCode sessions. `opencode` is accepted as an alias. |
| `hermes` | Hermes Agent | Headless Hermes Agent sessions. |
| `hermes-native` | Hermes Agent | Native Hermes TUI sessions, including `omni hermes`. |
| `goose` | Goose | Headless Goose sessions through ACP. |
| `goose-native` | Goose | Native Goose TUI sessions. |
| `qwen` | Qwen Code | Headless Qwen Code sessions through ACP. |
| `qwen-native` | Qwen Code | Native Qwen Code sessions. |
| `kimi` | Kimi Code | Headless Kimi Code sessions. `kimi-code` is accepted as an alias. |
| `kimi-native` | Kimi Code | Native Kimi Code TUI sessions. |
| `copilot` | GitHub Copilot SDK | Agents routed through GitHub Copilot. `github-copilot` is accepted as an alias. |
| `kiro-native` | Kiro CLI | Native Kiro sessions. |

Native harnesses run a vendor CLI/TUI and mirror it into Omnigent. SDK and
headless harnesses run as Omnigent-managed agent loops. Across the native fleet,
Omnigent supports the same session layer features where the underlying runtime
allows them: resume, fork, compaction, cost tracking, model switching, and web
approval cards.

## Swap harnesses

Tools, policies, and other config stay the same across harnesses. Just change the
`harness` value in your YAML, or override it at runtime:

```
omni run agent.yaml --harness codex
```

See [Models & Credentials](/docs/build/models) for how to set up API keys and choose models.
